special_mechanics.name: Pullstring Whip
special_mechanics.description: Woody equipped with a pullstring whip that temporarily ties up opponents, can latch onto hooks for swinging above terrain

special_mechanics.name: R.C. Racing Stages
special_mechanics.description: Overhead perspective racing stages with acceleration, braking, and steering mechanics; battery management for power depletion

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Maze
special_mechanics.description: First-person perspective stage where Woody navigates claw machine interior within time limit

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay description and level structure information. No quantitative physics parameters (speeds, acceleration, gravity values, sub-pixel precision) are documented. Movement mechanics are described functionally but not numerically.
